Peripheral.Name: Embedded Flash
Peripheral.Description: The Flash memory interface manages CPU AHB I-Code and D-Code accesses to the Flash memory. It implements the erase and program Flash memory operations and the read and write protection mechanisms

Peripheral.Name: Data EEPROM
Peripheral.Description: The Data EEPROM memory block. It contains user data.

Peripheral.Name: OTP
Peripheral.Description: The Data OTP memory block. It contains the one time programmable bits.

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit.

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Standby mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Available only on cryptography enabled devices

Values.Val: ST-iRoT (system flash) selected
OEM-iRoT (user flash) selected. In Open PRODUCT_STATE this value selects bootloader. Default value

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit.

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Standby mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Available only on cryptography enabled devices

Values.Val: ST-iRoT (system flash) selected
OEM-iRoT (user flash) selected. In Open PRODUCT_STATE this value selects bootloader. Default value

Bit.Name: SRAM1_RST
Bit.Description: SRAM1 erase upon system reset

Values.Val: SRAM1 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM1 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM2_RST
Bit.Description: SRAM2 erase upon system reset.

Values.Val: SRAM2 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM2 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check enabled
SRAM1 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: SRAM2_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM2 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM2 ECC check enabled
SRAM2 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: TZEN
Bit.Description: TrustZone enable configuration bits

Values.Val: TrustZone disabled
TrustZone enabled

Bit.Name: SRAM1_RST
Bit.Description: SRAM1 erase upon system reset

Values.Val: SRAM1 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM1 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM2_RST
Bit.Description: SRAM2 erase upon system reset.

Values.Val: SRAM2 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM2 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check enabled
SRAM1 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: SRAM2_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM2 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM2 ECC check enabled
SRAM2 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: TZEN
Bit.Description: TrustZone enable configuration bits

Values.Val: TrustZone disabled
TrustZone enabled

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies the mapping of bank address space after reset

Values.Val: Default mapping, Bank1 starts first
Altered mapping, Bank2 starts first

Bit.Name: SWAP_LOCK
Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies if the mapping of bank address space can be altered

Values.Val: Swapping permitted
Swapping disabled by configuration

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies the mapping of bank address space after reset

Values.Val: Default mapping, Bank1 starts first
Altered mapping, Bank2 starts first

Bit.Name: SWAP_LOCK
Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies if the mapping of bank address space can be altered

Values.Val: Swapping permitted
Swapping disabled by configuration

Bit.Name: BOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOTADD is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOTADD is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: SBOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD are frozen

Bit.Name: SBOOTADD
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry secure address

Bit.Name: SBOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD are frozen

Bit.Name: SBOOTADD
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry secure address

Bit.Name: LOCKBL
Bit.Description: OTP block lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL
Bit.Description: OTP block lock

Bit.Name: BL_COM_CFG
Bit.Description: Bootloader interface selection/configuration

Bit.Name: BL_COM_CFG
Bit.Description: Bootloader interface selection/configuration

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 start page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 end page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 start page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 end page

Bit.Name: WRPG1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRPG1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 1 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 1 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: WRPG2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRPG2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 2 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 2 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit.

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: A reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
No reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG1_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog 1 frozen in system Standby mode
Independent watchdog 1 keep running in system Standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Available only on cryptography enabled devices

Values.Val: ST-iRoT (system flash) selected
OEM-iRoT (user flash) selected. In Open PRODUCT_STATE this value selects bootloader. Default value

Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW

Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Bit.Description: Available only on cryptography enabled devices

Values.Val: ST-iRoT (system flash) selected
OEM-iRoT (user flash) selected. In Open PRODUCT_STATE this value selects bootloader. Default value

Bit.Description: SRAM1 erase upon system reset

Values.Val: SRAM1 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM1 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM2_RST
Bit.Description: SRAM2 erase upon system reset.

Values.Val: SRAM2 erased when a system reset occurs
SRAM2 not erased when a system reset occurs

Bit.Name: SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check enabled
SRAM1 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: SRAM2_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM2 ECC detection and correction disable

Values.Val: SRAM2 ECC check enabled
SRAM2 ECC check disabled

Bit.Name: TZEN
Bit.Description: TrustZone enable configuration bits

Values.Val: TrustZone disabled
TrustZone enabled

Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies the mapping of bank address space after reset

Values.Val: Default mapping, Bank1 starts first
Altered mapping, Bank2 starts first

Bit.Name: SWAP_LOCK
Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies if the mapping of bank address space can be altered

Values.Val: Swapping permitted
Swapping disabled by configuration

Bit.Description: Configuration option specifies the mapping of bank address space after reset

Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked

Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOTADD is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: SBOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD are frozen

Bit.Name: SBOOTADD
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry secure address

Bit.Name: SBOOT_LOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the value of BOOTADD

Values.Val: BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules
BOOT_UBE and secure BOOTADD are frozen

Bit.Name: SBOOTADD
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry secure address

Bit.Name: LOCKBL
Bit.Description: OTP block lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL
Bit.Description: OTP block lock

Bit.Name: BL_COM_CFG
Bit.Description: Bootloader interface selection/configuration

Bit.Name: BL_COM_CFG
Bit.Description: Bootloader interface selection/configuration

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 start page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 end page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 start page

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank1 security WM area 1 end page

Bit.Name: WRPG1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRPG1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 1 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 1 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area start page

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank2 security WM area end page

Bit.Name: WRPG2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRPG2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 page group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 2 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: STRT contains the start pages of the flash high-cycle data area in Bank 2 There is no hardware effect to those bits. They shall be managed by ST tools in Flasher

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 flash high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No flash high-cycle data area
Flash high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier start set in number of 8-Kbyte pages

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDPL barrier end set in number of 8-Kbyte pages
